mapper.sql: id, equipment_code, equipment_name, equipment_type, brand, model, size, rental_price, purchase_price, purchase_date, status, stock_quantity, available_quantity, image_url, description, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE equipment_code = #{equipmentCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_equipment
equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_type = #{equipmentType}, brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, size = #{size}, rental_price = #{rentalPrice}, purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, status = #{status}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE equipment_type = #{equipmentType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE status = 1 AND available_quantity > 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_equipment WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_equipment WHERE available_quantity <= #{threshold} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY available_quantity ASC
